presets.title: Gent gran — Funcionalitat i equilibri
presets.description: Faithful-mode functional training block for adults 60+. 2 sessions/week of 20–25 minutes focusing on movements relevant to daily life: sit-to-stand, balance, step-ups, posture. Conservative progression.
presets.notes: Designed for adults 60+ or deconditioned individuals; evidence suggests functional exercise may help maintain independence and reduce fall risk. Consult a healthcare professional before starting.

presets.title: Gent gran — Força i manteniment muscular
presets.description: Faithful-mode muscle maintenance strength block for adults 60+. 3 sessions/week with a mix of body-weight and band exercises. Can help counter sarcopenia with consistent practice.
presets.notes: Evidence suggests progressive resistance training can help maintain muscle mass and function in older adults; always prioritize technique over load. Consult a professional if any health condition is present.

presets.title: Gent gran — Equilibri i mobilitat
presets.description: Faithful-mode balance and mobility block for adults 60+. 2 sessions/week of 20 minutes. Combines proprioception exercises with dynamic range of motion work. Ideal as complement to a strength program.
presets.notes: Balance and proprioceptive training is associated with reduced fall risk in older adults in multiple systematic reviews; individual results may vary.

presets.title: Trail — Força excèntrica i baixades
presets.description: Faithful-mode eccentric strength block for trail runners targeting downhill capacity. 3 sessions/week, 8–10 week duration. Focuses on eccentric quad/hamstring/calf strength to reduce injury risk on descents.
presets.notes: Eccentric strength training is associated with reduced injury rates on descents in trail running literature; results require consistent application over 8+ weeks. May help reduce knee stress on downhills.

sessions.label: Sessió B — Força isquiotibials i glutis

presets.title: Trail — Força per a pujades
presets.description: Faithful-mode strength block for trail runners targeting uphill capacity. 3 sessions/week, undulating periodization. Develops hip extension power, single-leg stability and stride push-off strength.
presets.notes: Uphill-specific strength work focusing on hip extension and push-off capacity; may help improve power output on climbs and reduce muscular fatigue.

sessions.label: Sessió A — Força de cadera i gluti

presets.title: Banda elàstica — Cos complet
presets.description: Faithful-mode full-body resistance band program. No weights required. 2 sessions/week. Suitable for home training, travel, or as an introduction to structured resistance work.
presets.notes: Resistance band training can produce meaningful strength and hypertrophy adaptations when progressive overload is applied; increase band resistance or reps systematically.

presets.title: Banda elàstica — Força progressiva
presets.description: Faithful-mode progressive band strength program. 3 sessions/week, undulating periodization. Suitable for athletes who travel frequently or prefer equipment-free training with structured progression.
presets.notes: Progressive band training; increase resistance level or add reps/sets weekly. Day A and B alternate push/pull emphasis; Day C is full-body integration.

gent_gran_funcional_v1.name: Gent gran — Funcionalitat i equilibri
gent_gran_funcional_v1.description: Bloc de força funcional per a adults de 60+. 2 sessions/setmana de 20–25 minuts centrades en moviments quotidians: aixecar-se, equilibri, pujades, postura.

gent_gran_forca_manteniment_v1.name: Gent gran — Força i manteniment muscular
gent_gran_forca_manteniment_v1.description: Bloc de manteniment muscular per a adults de 60+. 3 sessions/setmana amb exercicis de pes corporal i banda elàstica. Pot ajudar a contrarestar la sarcopènia amb pràctica consistent.

gent_gran_equilibri_mobilitat_v1.name: Gent gran — Equilibri i mobilitat
gent_gran_equilibri_mobilitat_v1.description: Bloc d'equilibri i mobilitat per a adults de 60+. 2 sessions/setmana de 20 minuts. Combina exercicis de propiocepcó amb mobilitat dinàmica.

corredor_trail_excentric_baixades_v1.name: Trail — Força excèntrica i baixades
corredor_trail_excentric_baixades_v1.description: Bloc de força excèntrica per a corredors de trail. 3 sessions/setmana, 8–10 setmanes. Centrat en la força excèntrica de quàdriceps, isquiotibials i bessons per a baixades.

corredor_trail_pujada_forca_v1.name: Trail — Força per a pujades
corredor_trail_pujada_forca_v1.description: Bloc de força per a corredors de trail amb èmfasi en pujades. 3 sessions/setmana, periodització ondulant. Desenvolupa potència d'extensió de maluc i estabilitat monopodal.

banda_elastica_cos_complet_v1.name: Banda elàstica — Cos complet
banda_elastica_cos_complet_v1.description: Programa de cos complet amb banda elàstica. Sense pesos. 2 sessions/setmana. Adequat per entrenar a casa, en viatge o com a introducció a l'entrenament de resistència estructurat.

banda_elastica_forca_progressiva_v1.name: Banda elàstica — Força progressiva
banda_elastica_forca_progressiva_v1.description: Programa progressiu de força amb banda elàstica. 3 sessions/setmana, periodització ondulant. Per a atletes que viatgen o prefereixen entrenament sense equipament fix.

gent_gran_funcional_v1.name: Mayores — Funcionalidad y equilibrio
gent_gran_funcional_v1.description: Bloque de fuerza funcional para adultos de 60+. 2 sesiones/semana de 20–25 minutos centradas en movimientos cotidianos: levantarse, equilibrio, subidas, postura.

gent_gran_forca_manteniment_v1.name: Mayores — Fuerza y mantenimiento muscular
gent_gran_forca_manteniment_v1.description: Bloque de mantenimiento muscular para adultos de 60+. 3 sesiones/semana con ejercicios de peso corporal y banda elástica.

gent_gran_equilibri_mobilitat_v1.name: Mayores — Equilibrio y movilidad
gent_gran_equilibri_mobilitat_v1.description: Bloque de equilibrio y movilidad para adultos de 60+. 2 sesiones/semana de 20 minutos. Combina ejercicios de propiocepción con movilidad dinámica.

corredor_trail_excentric_baixades_v1.name: Trail — Fuerza excéntrica y bajadas
corredor_trail_excentric_baixades_v1.description: Bloque de fuerza excéntrica para corredores de trail. 3 sesiones/semana, 8–10 semanas. Centrado en la fuerza excéntrica de cuádriceps, isquiotibiales y gemelos para bajadas.

corredor_trail_pujada_forca_v1.name: Trail — Fuerza para subidas
corredor_trail_pujada_forca_v1.description: Bloque de fuerza para corredores de trail con énfasis en subidas. 3 sesiones/semana, periodización ondulante.

banda_elastica_cos_complet_v1.name: Banda elástica — Cuerpo completo
banda_elastica_cos_complet_v1.description: Programa de cuerpo completo con banda elástica. Sin pesos. 2 sesiones/semana. Adecuado para entrenar en casa, de viaje o como introducción al entrenamiento de resistencia.

banda_elastica_forca_progressiva_v1.name: Banda elástica — Fuerza progresiva
banda_elastica_forca_progressiva_v1.description: Programa progresivo de fuerza con banda elástica. 3 sesiones/semana, periodización ondulante.

gent_gran_funcional_v1.name: Seniors — Functionality & balance
gent_gran_funcional_v1.description: Functional strength block for adults 60+. 2 sessions/week of 20–25 minutes focusing on daily-life movements: sit-to-stand, balance, step-ups, posture.

gent_gran_forca_manteniment_v1.name: Seniors — Strength & muscle maintenance
gent_gran_forca_manteniment_v1.description: Muscle maintenance block for adults 60+. 3 sessions/week with body-weight and band exercises. May help counter sarcopenia with consistent practice.

gent_gran_equilibri_mobilitat_v1.name: Seniors — Balance & mobility
gent_gran_equilibri_mobilitat_v1.description: Balance and mobility block for adults 60+. 2 sessions/week of 20 minutes. Combines proprioception exercises with dynamic range of motion work.

corredor_trail_excentric_baixades_v1.name: Trail — Eccentric strength for descents
corredor_trail_excentric_baixades_v1.description: Eccentric strength block for trail runners targeting downhill capacity. 3 sessions/week, 8–10 weeks. Focuses on eccentric quad/hamstring/calf strength for descents.

corredor_trail_pujada_forca_v1.name: Trail — Uphill strength
corredor_trail_pujada_forca_v1.description: Strength block for trail runners targeting uphill capacity. 3 sessions/week, undulating periodization. Develops hip extension power and single-leg stability.

banda_elastica_cos_complet_v1.name: Resistance band — Full body
banda_elastica_cos_complet_v1.description: Full-body resistance band program. No weights required. 2 sessions/week. Suitable for home, travel, or as an introduction to structured resistance training.

banda_elastica_forca_progressiva_v1.name: Resistance band — Progressive strength
banda_elastica_forca_progressiva_v1.description: Progressive band strength program. 3 sessions/week, undulating periodization. For athletes who travel or prefer equipment-free training.
